details.productUrlName: Roxi Publicist to the Stars Galaxy Foil

customAttributes.description:
Flying
Roxi, Publicist to the Stars's power is equal to the number of permanents you control with an art sticker plus the number of cards in your graveyard with an art sticker.
When Roxi enters the battlefield, distribute up to two art stickers among one or two nonland permanents you own.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.

details.productName: Roxi, Publicist to the Stars (Galaxy Foil)

Flying
